step_by_step_thinking: I agree with the selection of A: LMW heparin. One additional point supporting its use is that it has been shown to have fewer drug interactions than some oral anticoagulants such as warfarin, which can be crucial in patients undergoing multiple medications including chemotherapeutic agents commonly prescribed alongside cancer therapy. Thus, my final answer remains A. ##
